explanation: The findings differ in experimental systems - Paper A shows somatostatin interneurons have no effect on inhibitory currents in mouse granule cells, while Paper B shows somatostatin decreases GABAergic currents in a human brain membrane system with TSC pathology.
resolving_experiment: Test somatostatin's effect on GABAergic currents in mouse granule cells from TSC models versus wild-type controls using the same patch-clamp methodology as Paper A.

claim_a.subject: somatostatin interneurons
claim_a.effect: inhibitory postsynaptic currents onto dendrites of granule cells in outer molecular layer

claim_b.subject: somatostatin
method: Xenopus laevis oocytes microtransplanted with human brain membranes
